title: No Ender Pearls
description: This mod removes all ender pearls from Minecraft, so you can’t throw them, collect them, or use them for teleporting or crafting. It makes the End way harder to reach and travel becomes much more limited.
body: No Ender Pearls deletes every source of ender pearls: endermen drops, cleric trades, piglin bartering, and all chest loot that normally contains them. Without pearls, you can’t make Eyes of Ender, so finding and activating the stronghold becomes a huge challenge unless your mod adds an alternative. Teleport movement is gone, speedrunning breaks, and escaping danger gets harder. It turns progression, travel, and End access into a tougher, more survival-focused experience.
